title: Burretiodendron esquirolii

Its bark and roots contain various bioactive compounds that have been reported to possess medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may contribute to its use in treating various health conditions. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation in the body.
